title: hebe × carnea
intro: Hebe × carnea, also known as the coral bells or coral hebe, is a hybrid plant species within the hebe genus, known for its vibrant red or pink flowers and attractive foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Hebe × carnea is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
